summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: 1) City search dropdown on landing page (desktop & mobile), 2) AI Customer Support Chatbot powered by GPT-4o-mini. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ChatBot component uses emergentintegrations LlmChat with GPT-4o-mini - real AI integration (NOT MOCKED)
Session ID properly managed for multi-turn conversations
Chatbot button positioned at bottom-20 to avoid overlap with 'Made with Emergent' badge
City dropdown properly filters cities on typing and closes on selection
Selected city badge shows with dismiss button (X) - UI working correctly
Navigation after city selection correctly passes city param to /venues/search
context_for_next_testing_agent: City dropdown and AI chatbot features fully tested. Key data-testids: chatbot-toggle-btn, chatbot-window, chatbot-close-btn, chatbot-input, chatbot-send-btn, chatbot-messages, chatbot-suggestions, city-dropdown-trigger, city-dropdown-list, city-option-all, city-option-{cityname}, explore-venues-btn. Chatbot uses emergentintegrations with GPT-4o-mini model via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY env var. Chat sessions stored in MongoDB chat_messages collection.

city_dropdown_desktop.all_cities_option: PASS - Shows and selects correctly, navigates to /venues/search
city_dropdown_desktop.city_selection: PASS - Clicking Delhi selects and closes dropdown
city_dropdown_desktop.selected_city_badge: PASS - Shows badge with city name and X dismiss button

city_dropdown_mobile_375px.city_list_display: PASS - Shows Delhi, Gurgaon, Greater Noida, Noida

chatbot_mobile_375px.window_opens: PASS - Opens correctly sized for mobile

chatbot_on_venues_page.toggle_visible: PASS - Chatbot available on venues search page

chatbot_multiturn.first_message: PASS - Query about wedding venue for 500 guests
chatbot_multiturn.ai_response_1: PASS - Suggests five-star hotels, luxury banquet halls, farmhouses
chatbot_multiturn.ai_response_2: PASS - Mentions ₹1,200 to ₹3,000 per plate range

chatbot_api_backend.knows_cities: PASS - Mentions Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Bangalore, Hyderabad
chatbot_api_backend.knows_process: PASS - Explains RM selection, booking flow

notes.ai_integration: Uses real GPT-4o-mini via emergentintegrations library - NOT MOCKED
notes.session_management: Sessions stored in-memory (chat_sessions dict) and logged to MongoDB chat_messages collection
notes.chatbot_position: bottom-20 right-5 to avoid overlap with 'Made with Emergent' badge
